title: salix cinerea var. pedicellata
intro: Salix cinerea var. pedicellata is a plant species within the Salicaceae family, commonly known as a variety of grey willow. The medicinal properties of Salix cinerea var. pedicellata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of using Salix cinerea var. pedicellata include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Salix cinerea var. pedicellata can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
